summary: Comprehensive testing completed for XOVA AI Mentor Platform. All backend APIs (17/17) passed. Frontend mobile UI fully functional with tab navigation, AI chat, aptitude system, interview practice, career guidance, startup mentor, and profile features working correctly. Authentication flow with Emergent Google OAuth verified. Mock payment system and community placeholder confirmed.

issues: Deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow instead)
Deprecation warnings: Image.resizeMode prop should be in props not style
These are non-critical warnings that don't affect functionality

action_items: Optional: Update React Native StyleSheet to use boxShadow instead of shadow* props (low priority)
Optional: Update package versions to match Expo SDK recommendations (non-blocking)

✓ Frontend: Proper React Native components used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✓ Frontend: Auth flow uses AsyncStorage for session token persistence
✓ Frontend: Expo Router file-based navigation working correctly

✓ Frontend: Dark cyberpunk theme implemented correctly
